prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document primarily focuses on the statistics and methodologies related to offenders in England and Wales, particularly those managed by His Majesty’s Prisons and Probation Service. It does not include any specific provisions or references to the legal or correctional systems in Scotland, indicating it does not apply there.
